sections.title: After Making Friends with My Arm

lines.speaker: Squirrel
lines.text: Not much to say. Came to Weiss with other trolls when we got kicked out of caves further south, but I was just young troll then.

lines.speaker: Squirrel
lines.text: Mostly been enjoying living round Weiss, 'cos wildlife is interesting here.

lines.speaker: Squirrel
lines.text: This here is Weiss. Trolls built it years ago, after we got kicked out from caves further south. Now Weiss is our home.

lines.speaker: Squirrel
lines.text: It great here, now Snowflake an' her husband troll taught us goutweed farming. Food so much better now.

lines.speaker: Squirrel
lines.text: Eh, it kinda rough, but it getting better. Snowflake, she taught us goutweed farming. Goat, wolf, human all taste so much nicer with goutweed in.

lines.speaker: Squirrel
lines.text: So yeah, Weiss is good place to live, now Snowflake in charge. All trolls like Snowflake. Her husband troll kinda weird, but that not our problem.
